title: Profile
appLanguageHint: Changes buttons and labels only — not questions or answers
logoutBody: You will be returned to the home screen.
clearBody: This will reset all your progress. This cannot be undone.
examDateSaveError: Could not save exam date. Please try again.
examDateInvalid: Enter a real date as YYYY-MM-DD (e.g. 2026-09-01).
examDateModalSub: Pick a quick option or type the exact date.
guestBlurb: Sign up or log in to manage your profile, set your exam date, and view your subscription.
